posts.author: Saryg (Rahul)
posts.cookedHtml: am having a lot of issues exporting information from monday. I have a general script on python where I dinamically create queries (editing limit, filters and of course identifying if pagination is needed). Most of the time I need to pull out all the information from boards, but as the boards have been growing the request have been failing more. So the way to
